name: Zhejiang grandwall electric science&technology co.,ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Grandwall Electric Science&Technology Co.,Ltd. develops, produces, and sells electromagnetic wire products in China and internationally. Its products are used in various industries, including new energy power generation, automotive drive motors, household appliances, industrial motors, automotive motors, power tools, instrumentation and lighting appliances, and others. The company is headquartered in Huzhou, China.
